summary_en: OMRON Healthcare (OMRON subsidiary) commenced tender offer for Matsushita R&D (TSE Growth 7317) following regulatory approvals in Taiwan and Vietnam.
title_en: Notice Regarding Commencement of Tender Offer for Matsushita R&D Co., Ltd. Shares (Securities Code: 7317)
translation_en_brief: OMRON Corporation announced on 18 May 2026 that its subsidiary OMRON Healthcare has commenced a tender offer for Matsushita R&D Co., Ltd. (TSE Growth Market, code 7317). The tender offer was previously announced on 15 December 2025 as scheduled to begin pending satisfaction of certain closing conditions, primarily completion of foreign competition law approvals in Taiwan and Vietnam. The offer targets both ordinary shares and stock acquisition rights issued by the target company. OMRON Healthcare, based in Kyoto, operates in the development and sales of consumer and medical health devices, health management software, and health promotion services, with capital of ¥5,021 million as of 31 March 2026.
